$comment: Community-curated changelog database. NVIDIA publishes no official per-DLL changelogs, so entries are sourced from community testing (TechPowerUp, r/DLSS_Swapper, Digital Foundry). PRs welcome; keep 'changes' short and factual. The entries below are seeds — verify before publishing.

changes: Maintenance build in the DLSS 4 transformer line
DLSS 4 transformer line update; reduced ghosting on high-contrast edges vs 310.5
Frame Generation build aligned with DLSS 310.7; includes the multi-frame generation (MFG) pipeline
Ray Reconstruction transformer denoiser aligned with DLSS 310.7
XeSS 2.0.2 SDK build; stability and game-compatibility fixes over 2.0.1
XeSS Frame Generation 1.3.1; pacing improvements on Arc and non-Arc GPUs
FidelityFX SDK 1.0.2 DX12 upscaler DLL (FSR 3.1.2 line)
known_issues: Only valid for games shipping amd_fidelityfx_dx12.dll

changes: FidelityFX SDK Vulkan upscaler DLL (FSR 3.1.4 line)
known_issues: Only valid for games shipping amd_fidelityfx_vk.dll

changes: DLSS 4 transformer-model line; improved detail stability in motion
Preset K refinements over J: less ghosting on thin geometry
Reduced shimmering on vegetation vs 3.x CNN presets
known_issues: Slightly higher GPU cost than CNN presets on older RTX cards

changes: Preset E becomes the default; clearer image in motion than preset C/D
First release of Ray Reconstruction (denoiser replacement for RT games)
known_issues: Only affects games that ship RR support; swapping it in elsewhere does nothing

changes: Frame Generation pacing improvements; fewer micro-stutters with VRR displays
